description: System knowledge about brain-openclaw — inject into OpenClaw agent memories

nodes.text: brain-openclaw is the OpenClaw plugin adapter for brain. It registers five native tools into OpenClaw agents: brain_recall, brain_push, brain_explore, brain_get, brain_remove.
brain-openclaw wires a 30-minute flush cron (processes queue.jsonl → graph) and an after_compaction hook that records each session compaction as an experience node in the brain graph.

In OpenClaw multi-agent setups, each agent has a separate BRAIN_DIR (e.g. ~/corpus/brain/karpathy, ~/corpus/brain/neo). The plugin sets BRAIN_DIR and BRAIN_AGENT_ID via environment variables per agent session.

brain_recall should be called at session start and whenever a new topic comes up. brain_push should be called after completing tasks, making decisions, or learning durable facts. Do not wait for compaction — push immediately.
